description_long: This object is a modern assault rifle, visually resembling the iconic AK-47 design, with a robust, matte black finish. It features a fixed stock, a prominent pistol grip, and a long, straight barrel with a front sight post and a slanted muzzle device. The receiver is boxy and angular, with a visible charging handle and a top-mounted rear sight. A detachable, curved box magazine is shown separated from the rifle, indicating its removable nature. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a sturdy and utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A matte black assault rifle with a fixed stock, curved detachable magazine, and iron sights, resembling an AK-47.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the rifle, including the fixed stock, pistol grip, barrel, and detached curved magazine below.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow width of the rifle, the barrel's end, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rifle's full length, fixed stock, and the detached magazine positioned below and to the right.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the back of the stock, the slim profile of the receiver, and the magazine's curvature.
